response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack engineering experience, relevant AI-agent infrastructure work, and entrepreneurial background, but lacks clear, high-impact AI product development or cloud strategy leadership. His technical breadth is strong, but his AI expertise is not prominently demonstrated in his resume or project history.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience with scalable systems
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Entrepreneurial background with open-source project leadership
concerns: Limited clear evidence of AI product/platform building (required expertise)
No direct cloud or AI strategy leadership in large-scale organizations
AI-related work is recent and not prominently featured
